title: centaurea procumbens subsp. aemilii
intro: Centaurea procumbens subsp. aemilii, also known as the Aemilius centaury or Centaurea aemilii, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its sprawling stems and purple flowers. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Centaurea procumbens subsp. aemilii include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
